title: blechnum ascendens
intro: Blechnum ascendens, also known as the ladder fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Blechnum ascendens include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and relieve congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the ladder fern are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
